name: github_corpus_convergence
host_notes: Phase B-2 first 100-round run on the trellis-ai PR corpus. Same architectural pattern as Phase B-1's headline (KeywordSearch + SemanticSearch + SeededGraphSearch with entity-name extraction). Embeddings only; no chat LLM.

skills_at_100_percent_on_both_corpora: B-1 change_impact + downstream_lineage + end_to_end_lineage map structurally to B-2 topic_content + cross_pr_lineage + reverse_lineage — both corpora exercise content + edge-traversal queries that succeed.
comparison_to_phase_b1_dbt.skills_at_0_percent_on_both: Multi-required-entity queries (B-1 multi_hop_lineage, B-2 multi_pr_series + adr_landing) and intents-without-entity-names (B-1 layer_classification + test_coverage, B-2 author_attribution) fail on both corpora for the same reasons — pack budget contention and seed-extraction gaps.
comparison_to_phase_b1_dbt.useful_delta: B-1: +0.146, B-2: +0.005. The B-2 corpus is larger (90 vs 21 entities) and queries are more varied, so the noise loop has more candidates to manage; convergence is slower in absolute terms but still positive.
comparison_to_phase_b1_dbt.headline_finding: The architectural pattern from B-1 (entity-name extraction + SeededGraphSearch + canonical id dedup wrapper) generalizes to a different real corpus with different entity types, different edge kinds, and different content shape. Same skills succeed; same skills fail. That's the cross-corpus generalization signal Phase B was designed to produce.

interpretation.cross_pr_lineage_at_100_percent: wasInformedBy traversal works as designed. PR #66 'release: v0.5.0 — backfill #60-#64' correctly surfaces the 5 cited PRs via outgoing wasInformedBy edges; the seed extractor pulls #66 from the intent string and GraphSearch's get_subgraph(depth=2) pulls in the cross-references. This is the PROV-O wiring proving its keep on a non-toy corpus.
interpretation.reverse_lineage_at_100_percent: Incoming-edge traversal also works (PR #34 → finds PRs that cite it). get_subgraph is bidirectional, so reverse-lineage and forward-lineage both work without code changes.
interpretation.topic_content_at_100_percent: Rich PR bodies (avg 2.8K chars/PR) give KeywordSearch and SemanticSearch strong signal. Three queries hit specific PRs by topic alone (Neo4j hardening plan #20, schema.org+PROV-O ontology #16, bulk upsert intro #34).
interpretation.author_attribution_at_0_percent: The dependabot query has the user → PR traversal graph wired correctly, but the dependabot PR(s) loses pack-budget contention to keyword/semantic items mentioning 'PR', 'authored', 'ronsse'. Same root cause as B-1's test_cross_reference: GraphSearch surfaces the right answer but it gets cut by 8-item budget when keyword/semantic produce competing items with higher scores. The fix is the same — per-query budget or strategy-aware ranking.
interpretation.useful_delta_barely_positive: +0.005 is not a meaningful convergence signal. The corpus is too varied for the noise loop to find consistent reinforcement patterns at 12-query rotation × 8 firings each. The 24 advisories boosted (vs B-1's 54) suggests the fitness loop is finding fewer reliable signals on this corpus.

decision_recorded: Phase B-2 produces a pass and a cross-corpus generalization story. The seeded-GraphSearch pattern works on a real OSS-shaped corpus. The same architectural follow-ups apply (per-query pack budget, phrase-based seed extraction for non-entity intents) — they would lift author_attribution / adr_landing / multi_pr_series from 0% to non-zero on this corpus too, just as they would lift the equivalent skills on dbt. The plan-real-corpus-eval.md §5.3 acceptance criteria are met: a citable chart on a corpus that wasn't authored to make the loop succeed.
follow_ups_pending: Per-query pack budget — at least max_items=12+ for multi-required-entity queries. Same fix that B-1 needs.

LLM-based or phrase-based seed extraction for category intents like 'author_attribution' — the dependabot login is in the name index but the query also uses words like 'authored by' / 'not by ronsse'.
Capture a no-GraphSearch baseline on github_trellis for clean before/after diff (mirrors B-1's baseline file). Quick to run.
